skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Run Codex CLI, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Pi Coding Agent via background process for programmatic control.</description>
    <location>/Users/acelin/Documents/Next/AIGC/openclaw/skills/coding-agent/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>/Users/acelin/Documents/Next/AIGC/openclaw/skills/healthcheck/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>himalaya</name>
    <description>CLI to manage emails via IMAP/SMTP. Use `himalaya` to list, read, write, reply, forward, search, and organize emails from the terminal. Supports multiple accounts and message composition with MML (MIME Meta Language).</description>
    <location>/Users/acelin/Documents/Next/AIGC/openclaw/skills/himalaya/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>pm-docs</name>
    <description>Product Manager skills for creating PRDs and technical specs.</description>
    <location>/Users/acelin/Documents/Next/AIGC/openclaw/skills/pm-docs/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>product-manager</name>
    <description>产品经理组合技能：执行市场需求分析、竞品调研与用户画像生成。</description>
    <location>/Users/acelin/Documents/Next/AIGC/openclaw/skills/product-manager/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>project-manager</name>
    <description>项目管理全流程：需求分析、任务拆解与进度跟踪。</description>
    <location>/Users/acelin/Documents/Next/AIGC/openclaw/skills/project-manager/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.</description>
    <location>/Users/acelin/Documents/Next/AIGC/openclaw/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>task-tracker</name>
    <description>Manage tasks and issues using simple file-based system or CLI.</description>
    <location>/Users/acelin/Documents/Next/AIGC/openclaw/skills/task-tracker/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>trae</name>
    <description>Control Trae IDE chat and features via CLI.</description>
    <location>/Users/acelin/Documents/Next/AIGC/openclaw/skills/trae/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts (no API key required).</description>
    <location>/Users/acelin/Documents/Next/AIGC/openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>
